other_observers: None, but have sent photos to others to confirm; I am the original finder of the bird
description: Crown and auriculars patterned rufous on gray. Distinctly streaked rufous and gray on back. Whitish wing barsBehaviors: The bird arrived at my feeder and promptly dug itself a little hole and sat there for a moment before getting up and scratching at the area beneath the feeder. It foraged around on the ground.Call: Not heardPlumage: Adult Red Taiga
photographer: Photographer: Polly Neldner, Polly Wren Neldner
